# =========================================================================
# texture — unpitched one-shots. ~200 prompts.
# Style mix (generated lines): ~79% EDM/electronic. EDM-forward, full spectrum.
# Generated by gen_prompts.py (deterministic). Curated lines preserved on top.
# =========================================================================
